CustomField.description: Quick place to jot notes/memory joggers when creating a contact in the field. ***Not intended for permanent data storage.***
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Use to quickly jot notes when creating a Contact "on the fly". (Search before Creating!) This field is NOT for permanent storage of data. A task will be created and assigned to you based on your input here, and this field will be emptied immediately.
CustomField.label: Quick Temp Notes
